positive: A highly symmetrical, stylized celestial mandala illustration featuring cosmic fauna (stylized deer, moons, constellations) and intricate geometric patterns. The design should have a central, bold focus and utilize a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, metallic gold, and cream. Style: Art Nouveau meets retro sci-fi vector art, suitable for screen printing. The composition must be clean, bold, and suitable for apparel placement. Ensure strong silhouettes and crisp lines, reminiscent of copper etching or silkscreen print.
negative: blur, grainy, signature, watermark, text, logo, copyright, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, artifact, noise, low detail, out of focus, sketch, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo
